candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

Non-current assets, not current assets.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Balancing value, inferior to the direct reported cash line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash can reconcile to balance-sheet cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet cash line as preferred source.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct match for short-term debt/current interest-bearing borrowings; excludes lease liabilities and is cleaner than candidate shortlist items.
Short-term debt label exists in shortlist, but non-interest-bearing debt is not the standard financing debt measure for STD and values are blank.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Would be relevant if populated, but appears blank in preview and may not be the primary reported current debt line.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the clearest reported short-term financing debt line on the balance sheet. Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per STD rule.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best available balance-sheet line representing total property, plant and equipment/fixed tangible assets on a net basis; preferred over component gross/accumulated depreciation rows.
Gross component only and labeled 'Other'; inferior to a broader total fixed assets line.
Net PPE component, but not total PPE.
Net PPE component, but not total PPE and appears zero/blank.

variables.notes: Selected a confident label outside the shortlist because 'Fixed Assets' is the cleanest reported total/net tangible fixed assets line. Avoided gross/component PPE rows and excluded right-of-use assets from baseline PPE.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Direct reported operating cash flow total on the cash flow statement.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities- Continuing operations
candidates.why: Could be relevant for some years, but appears sparse and continuing-operations-specific; the general operating cash flow total is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Other Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Component only, not the total operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities- Continuing operations

variables.notes: Priority list uses the standard total operating cash flow line first; continuing-operations line included as backup for years where labeling changes.
